sections.title: CANADIAN MLS
sections.contentHtml:
FEEDS COMPLIANCE POLICY

Complete Edition — For Real Estate Marketplace Platforms

Comprehensive guide covering all Canadian provinces and territories

CREA | TRREB/PropTx | ITSO | GVR/FVREB/CADREB | CREB/Pillar 9 | QPAREB/Centris

NSAR | EREB | WinnipegREALTORS | SRA | NBREA | NLREA | PEIARA

RECO | BCFSA | RECA | OACIQ | SREC | MSC | FCNB | NSREC | PEI | NL

sections.title: Official References & Links
sections.contentHtml:
All sources below are official organization websites, government portals, or official board publications. Third-party or secondary sources are not listed in this section.

National Bodies

OrganizationOfficial URL
CREA — Canadian Real Estate Associationhttps://www.crea.ca/
CREA DDF — Member Info & Policieshttps://www.crea.ca/realtor-members/data-distribution-facility-ddf/
CREA DDF Policy & Rules PDF (Jan 2024)https://www.crea.ca/files/technology/english/DDFR-Policy-and-Rules-February-2024-ENG.pdf
CREA DDF API Documentationhttps://ddfapi-docs.realtor.ca/
CREA DDF Member Loginhttps://member.realtor.ca
CREA DDF Supporthttps://support.crea.ca/DDF
REALTOR.ca (public listing portal)https://www.realtor.ca/

Ontario Boards

OrganizationOfficial URL
TRREB — Toronto Regional Real Estate Boardhttps://trreb.ca/
PropTx — MLS Technology Subsidiary of TRREBhttps://proptx.ca/
TRREB Member Hub (login)https://member.trreb.ca/
TRREB Member Profile Portal (PropTx login)https://myprofile.torontomls.net/login
ITSO — Information Technology Systems Ontariohttps://www.itsosystems.ca/
ITSO System Access & Feed Infohttps://www.itsosystems.ca/access
ITSO Professional Standards Committeehttps://www.itsosystems.ca/psc
BDAR — Barrie and District Association of REALTORShttps://www.bdar.ca/
Cornerstone Association of REALTORS (ITSO partner)https://www.cornerstone.inc/

OrganizationOfficial URL
Greater Vancouver REALTORS (GVR)https://www.gvrealtors.ca/
GVR Member Portal & WebAPI/BridgeAPI FAQhttps://member.gvrealtors.ca/en/newsletter/member-update-emails/transitioning-to-webapi-faq-for-vendors-and-developers.html
GVR Legal Information / Termshttps://www.gvrealtors.ca/legal-information.html
Fraser Valley Real Estate Board (FVREB)https://www.fvreb.bc.ca/
Chilliwack & District Real Estate Board (CADREB)https://www.cadreb.ca/

BridgeAPI (GVR/FVREB/CADREB WebAPI feed platform)https://www.bridgeinteractive.com/

Additional Official References — New Sections

Privacy Law

Office of the Privacy Commissioner (OPC) — PIPEDAhttps://www.priv.gc.ca/en/
OPC — PIPEDA Fair Information Principleshttps://www.priv.gc.ca/en/privacy-topics/privacy-laws-in-canada/the-personal-information-protection-and-electronic-documents-act-pipeda/p_principle/
OPC — Breach Reporting for Businesseshttps://www.priv.gc.ca/en/report-a-concern/report-a-privacy-breach-as-a-business/
Commission d'accès à l'information (CAI) — Quebec Law 25https://www.cai.gouv.qc.ca/
BC Office of the Information & Privacy Commissioner (OIPC)https://www.oipc.bc.ca/
Alberta Office of the Information & Privacy Commissioner (OIPC)https://www.oipc.ab.ca/

CASL, Accessibility & Competition

CRTC — CASL Official Resource Centrehttps://crtc.gc.ca/eng/internet/anti.htm
CRTC — CASL FAQhttps://crtc.gc.ca/eng/com500/faq500.htm
fightspam.gc.ca — CASL Government Resourcehttps://fightspam.gc.ca/
Accessible Canada Act (ACA) — Canada.cahttps://www.canada.ca/en/employment-social-development/programs/accessible-canada.html
ACA Regulations Summaryhttps://www.canada.ca/en/employment-social-development/programs/accessible-canada/regulations-summary-act.html
AODA — Ontario accessibilityhttps://www.ontario.ca/page/accessibility-in-ontario
WCAG 2.1 Official Guidelines (W3C)https://www.w3.org/TR/WCAG21/
Competition Bureau — Canada.cahttps://competition-bureau.canada.ca/en
Competition Bureau — CREA Investigation (Oct 2024)https://www.canada.ca/en/competition-bureau/news/2024/10/competition-bureau-advances-investigation-into-the-canadian-real-estate-associations-policies.html
Competition Bureau — QPAREB 2nd Court Order (May 2025)https://www.canada.ca/en/competition-bureau/news/2025/05/the-competition-bureau-obtains-a-second-court-order-to-advance-an-investigation-of-competition-in-the-quebec-real-estate-services-market.html
Competition Bureau — GVR Investigation (Jan 2026)https://www.canada.ca/en/competition-bureau/news/2026/01/competition-bureau-expands-its-investigation-of-real-estate-commission-rules-to-include-greater-vancouver-realtors.html
Competition Bureau — Algorithmic Pricing Statement (2025)https://competition-bureau.canada.ca/en/how-we-foster-competition/education-and-outreach/competition-bureau-position-statement-regarding-its-civil-investigation-realpages-and-yardis

RESO & Technical Standards

RESO — Real Estate Standards Organizationhttps://www.reso.org/
RESO Web API Documentationhttps://www.reso.org/reso-web-api/
RESO Data Dictionary 2.0https://www.reso.org/data-dictionary/
RESO Web API Transition Leaderboardhttps://www.reso.org/web-api-transition-leaderboard/
CREA DDF API Documentationhttps://ddfapi-docs.realtor.ca/
BridgeInteractive (GVR/FVREB/CADREB WebAPI)https://www.bridgeinteractive.com/

Final Disclaimer & Document Governance

This document is a comprehensive reference guide for real estate marketplace compliance in Canada. It does not constitute legal advice. Laws, board rules, and regulatory requirements change frequently. Always verify current requirements with: your specific boards and associations, a privacy lawyer for PIPEDA/Law 25/PIPA obligations, a competition lawyer for Competition Act questions, and accessibility specialists for AODA/ACA compliance. This document should be reviewed and updated at minimum annually, and immediately upon any material change to Canadian MLS rules, privacy law, or Competition Bureau enforcement activity.

Document version: 2026 Edition (Complete) | Sections 1-22 | Last updated: March 2026 | Next scheduled review: March 2027
